name: Cherry Cake,1st Prize Winner
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cherries, almonds, and 1/2 cup of flour. Mix until well coated. Set aside.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the remaining flour, baking powder, and salt. Beat together the sugar, butter, and flavorings (vanilla and almond extracts) until light and fluffy. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Gently stir in the flour mixture alternately with milk. Fold in the reserved flour and fruit.
4. Grease and flour a 12-cup bundt pan. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
5. Bake in a preheated oven set to 300°F for 55 minutes, or until the cake is firm to the touch. Allow cooling in the pan for 10 minutes before turning out onto a wire rack to cool completely.
6. Wrap the cooled cake in foil and store it in the refrigerator for several days to allow it to ripen.
